content:
Character: Camille Laurent
Perception: The French girl from the fifth floor — tall, thin, always dressed in black like she's going to a funeral, but elegant. She comes to Golden Autumn twice a week and always orders the mapo tofu. She eats like someone who forgets to eat, so I add extra dishes. She reminds me a little of Gemma — young, far from family, working too hard. She always insists on paying full price and leaves a good tip, which tells me she has pride. I think she sees me as a kind old man. I see her as another young person this city is trying to swallow. I hope she makes it.

She reminds me a little of Gemma — young, far from family, working too hard. She always insists on paying full price and leaves a good tip, which tells me she has pride. I think she sees me as a kind old man. I see her as another young person this city is trying to swallow. I hope she makes it.
